nodes.label: थप्प रोटी थप्प दाल
nodes.description: Chapter 10 - A story about food, culture, and togetherness from Rimjhim textbook

nodes.label: कहानी परिचय (Story Introduction)
nodes.description: A story celebrating Indian food culture, especially roti and dal

nodes.label: विषय: भारतीय खाना
nodes.description: The story centres on Indian food traditions, especially the everyday meal of roti and dal

nodes.label: संदेश: सादा खाना सबसे अच्छा
nodes.description: Simple food like roti-dal is nutritious, delicious, and brings people together

nodes.label: रोटी बनाने की प्रक्रिया (Making Roti)
nodes.description: The process of making roti - from wheat flour to the finished chapati

nodes.label: आटा गूँधना (Kneading Dough)
nodes.description: Mixing wheat flour with water and kneading it into soft dough

nodes.label: बेलना और सेंकना (Rolling & Cooking)
nodes.description: Rolling the dough into round shapes and cooking on a hot griddle

nodes.label: थप्प - रोटी फूलना (Puffing)
nodes.description: The 'thapp' sound when roti puffs up on the flame - the joyful moment

nodes.label: खाने की संस्कृति (Food Culture)
nodes.description: Indian traditions and customs related to food and eating together

nodes.label: मिलकर खाना (Eating Together)
nodes.description: The tradition of the whole family sitting together for meals

nodes.label: भारतीय खाने की विविधता
nodes.description: Variety of foods from different regions of India - all part of one culture

nodes.label: त्योहार और खाना
nodes.description: Special foods made during festivals - connecting celebrations with cuisine

nodes.label: जीवन की सीख (Life Lessons)
nodes.description: Important lessons about food, gratitude, and togetherness

nodes.label: किसान की मेहनत
nodes.description: Appreciating the hard work of farmers who grow our food

nodes.label: खाना बर्बाद न करो
nodes.description: Never waste food - respect the effort that goes into growing and cooking it
